story: On the last night before Erikh’s puberty, he and Shilvana slipped from the Dorm. They moved past kitchens and library, across the masters’ floor, and into the moonlit garden. Two masters stood at the gate to the Cromera’s grounds. The song drifted over the wall like flute wind. At the garden’s far corner, there was a fist-sized gap between stones—a narrow peephole into the grounds. They had no time for questions or plans; being caught meant lashes and chains. Shilvana squeezed Erikh’s hand as they crouched within sight of the guards.
implausible_knowledge: At the garden’s far corner, there was a fist-sized gap between stones—a narrow peephole into the grounds.
question: With two masters guarding the gate and time running short, what will Shilvana do to try to see the Cromera?
answer_with_knowledge: Skirt the garden edge and peer through the gap.
answer_without_knowledge: Hurl stones to stun the two guards and rush the gate.
